description: Derive identity Ed25519 signing keypair and X25519 encryption public key from a 32-byte identity seed. Since v1.0.1 f14-1 the Ed25519 signature is computed over `MANIFEST_SIGN_CONTEXT (b"Mosaic_Manifest_v1") || identityMessage` to prevent FFI signing-oracle attacks where an attacker could otherwise forge a sealed-bundle signature by passing `BUNDLE_SIGN_CONTEXT || crafted-sealed-box` to `signManifestWithIdentity`. The bundle path now bypasses `sign_manifest_with_identity` and signs Ed25519 directly over `BUNDLE_SIGN_CONTEXT || sealed`, so the two domains never alias.

algorithms.encryption: X25519 derived via libsodium ed25519_pk_to_curve25519 / ed25519_sk_to_curve25519

serverBoundOutputs.name: signingPubkey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Identity public key is published for manifest signature verification.

serverBoundOutputs.name: encryptionPubkey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: X25519 public key is used as a sealed-box recipient pin.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: identitySeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Identity seed is wrapped under L2 and must never reach the server.
